data.name: Santa’s Little Secrets – Naughty Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
Santa has his secrets… and none of them are innocent.
In Santa’s Little Secrets – Naughty Jigsaw, the holiday season gets curves, charm, and an irresistible variety of sensual women. Piece together seductive puzzles featuring 30 exclusive images of women from different ethnicities, styles, and personalities, all wrapped in a warm and tempting Christmas atmosphere.

Each puzzle reveals a new kind of beauty — captivating looks, alluring bodies, and poses that mix elegance, attitude, and just the right touch of festive mischief.
Perfect for anyone who wants to relax… and let the naughtier side of Christmas take over. 😈🎁

🎅 Game Highlights:

🧩 Three difficulty levels — 81, 196, or 361 pieces.
📸 30 exclusive images featuring sensual women of diverse ethnic backgrounds.
💋 A wide variety of looks, styles, and charms, each with its own seductive appeal.
🎁 Unlock and download your favorite images to build your personal collection of Christmas beauties.
🏆 Plenty of achievements to earn, adding that extra taste of progress to every puzzle completed.
🎶 Smooth, cozy Christmas soundtrack, blending warmth and subtle sensuality.
🌟 Elegant and intuitive interface, perfect for a relaxing and immersive experience.

Experience a more intimate, mysterious… and delightfully naughty Christmas.
Santa’s Little Secrets – Naughty Jigsaw: because some gifts aren’t wrapped — you piece them together. 🎁😉

data.short_description: Christmas just got a lot hotter! 🔥💋 Santa’s Little Secrets – Naughty Jigsaw features 30 seductive puzzles with women of diverse ethnicities and 3 difficulty levels, for a relaxing, fun… and irresistibly tempting holiday experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 瑞典文*, 法文*, 德文*, 波蘭文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
